title: calea tridactylita
intro: Calea tridactylita, also known as "Dream Herb" or "Nicotiana-like flower", is a plant species native to Mexico and Central America, traditionally used for its sedative and medicinal properties. The plant contains psychoactive compounds, including sesquiterpenes and alkaloids, which are believed to have a calming effect on the nervous system. The health benefits of Calea tridactylita include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and restlessness, as well as its potential to reduce stress and promote relaxation. Calea tridactylita is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be used in smudging ceremonies to promote a peaceful and calming atmosphere.
